summary: Iteration 20 - Object Storage and Cloud Attachment Features Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Card detail modal shows 'Add Attachment', 'Google Drive', and 'Dropbox' buttons. Attachments display with source badges (Drive/Dropbox). Image previews work with /api/storage/ URLs. Set as Cover buttons present for image attachments. Integrations page shows Google Drive, OneDrive (Coming Soon), and Dropbox cards with Connect buttons. File pickers show 'not connected' state with 'Go to Integrations' link when cloud services not connected.
passed_tests: Backend: Login returns valid session_token
Backend: Health check endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/integrations/status returns status for google_drive and dropbox
Backend: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/connect returns 307 redirect to Google OAuth
Backend: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/connect returns 307 redirect to Dropbox OAuth
Backend: POST /api/cards/{card_id}/attachments stores file in object storage and returns /api/storage/ URL
Backend: Uploaded file can be downloaded from returned /api/storage/ URL with correct content type
Backend: Image upload works and returns downloadable URL
Backend: GET /api/storage/{path} returns 404 for non-existent files
Backend: GET /api/cards/{card_id} includes attachments array
Backend: PATCH /api/cards/{card_id}/cover sets cover image successfully
Backend: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/files returns 401 when not connected
Backend: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/files returns 401 when not connected
Backend: POST /api/integrations/google-drive/attach validates card_id and file_id (400 if missing)
Backend: POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach validates card_id and file_id (400 if missing)
Frontend: Login and dashboard navigation work correctly
Frontend: Card detail modal opens with attachments section
Frontend: 'Add Attachment' button present in card modal
Frontend: 'Google Drive' button present in card modal
Frontend: 'Dropbox' button present in card modal
Frontend: Attachments show 'Drive' source badge for Google Drive files
Frontend: Attachments show 'Dropbox' source badge for Dropbox files
Frontend: Image attachments show preview with /api/storage/ URLs
Frontend: 'Set as Cover' buttons present for image attachments
Frontend: Google Drive file picker opens and shows 'not connected' state
Frontend: Dropbox file picker opens and shows 'not connected' state
Frontend: Integrations page loads with Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox cards
Frontend: Google Drive and Dropbox have Connect buttons (OneDrive shows Coming Soon)
critical_code_review_comments: Object storage integration working correctly - files stored via Emergent Object Storage and served via /api/storage/{path}
Fallback to local storage implemented if object storage fails
Cloud file attachments (Google Drive, Dropbox) are DOWNLOADED and STORED in object storage, not just linked
Google Docs/Sheets/Presentations are exported to PDF when attached from Drive
Source badges correctly identify attachment origin (Drive/Dropbox)
OAuth redirect URIs not configured for preview environment (expected - noted in context)
seed_data_creation: test_storage_file.txt and test_image_storage.png uploaded to card_da16e8e57260 during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified object storage and cloud attachment features. Key implementations: 1) Object storage initialized at startup using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. 2) put_object/get_object helpers for storage operations. 3) /api/storage/{path} endpoint serves stored files. 4) Regular file uploads use object storage with local fallback. 5) Google Drive and Dropbox attachments download files and store in object storage (not just link). 6) CardDetailModal.js shows attachment buttons and source badges. 7) DriveFilePicker.js and DropboxFilePicker.js handle file selection with 'not connected' states. 8) IntegrationsPage shows 3 cards: Google Drive (Connect), OneDrive (Coming Soon), Dropbox (Connect). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_object_storage_attachments.py

object_storage_init.details: Object storage initialized at startup using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from backend/.env

file_upload_to_storage.details: POST /api/cards/{card_id}/attachments stores file in object storage, returns /api/storage/ URL

storage_file_serving.details: GET /api/storage/{path} serves files with correct content type

integration_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/status returns google_drive and dropbox connection status

google_drive_oauth_redirect.details: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/connect returns 307 redirect to Google OAuth

dropbox_oauth_redirect.details: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/connect returns 307 redirect to Dropbox OAuth

card_detail_attachment_buttons.details: Card modal shows 'Add Attachment', 'Google Drive', 'Dropbox' buttons

attachment_source_badges.details: Attachments display 'Drive' or 'Dropbox' badges based on source

image_preview.details: Image attachments show inline preview with /api/storage/ URLs

set_as_cover.details: Set as Cover buttons present for image attachments, PATCH /api/cards/{card_id}/cover works

integrations_page.details: Shows Google Drive (Connect), OneDrive (Coming Soon), Dropbox (Connect) cards

file_pickers.details: Google Drive and Dropbox file pickers open and show 'not connected' state with link to Integrations
